title: cotoneaster simonsii var. newryensis
intro: Cotoneaster simonsii var. newryensis, also known as Newry cotoneaster, is a variety of the Cotoneaster simonsii plant, a deciduous shrub native to China and parts of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant's berries are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, providing health benefits such as boosting the immune system, protecting against cardiovascular disease, and supporting eye health. Herbal preparations of Cotoneaster simonsii var. newryensis often involve drying the leaves and berries to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
